title: Deep-Sea Cable Spare-Parts Positioning on a Supply Tree
strategies: trivial: gold-plate every depot to safety factor 4 (evaluator baseline; always feasible) -> ~0.1
greedy: node-wise newsvendor optimum k*=Phi^{-1}(1-h/p), ignoring the network fill-rate floor; feasible+cheap on 'loose' instances but violates beta on 'tight' ones -> 0 there

strong: constrained Lagrangian water-filling -- inflate the effective penalty p+lambda uniformly and bisect lambda to the smallest value meeting the network fill rate, giving the min-cost feasible design everywhere
invalid: zero safety stock everywhere -> network fill rate ~0.6 < beta -> infeasible on every instance -> 0
